reference: Hi, lung opacity at this age should always be carefully investigated. There may be some other causes, but malignancy is also a possibility. A high-resolution computed tomography scan of the chest should be an initial diagnostic test. Based on the Hounsfield unit characteristics of the lump, a radiologist can provide further insights. Follow your doctor's advice.
text: Hi. Lung opacity at this age should always be carefully investigated. There may be some other causes, but malignancy is also a possibility. A high-resolution computed tomography scan of the chest should be an initial diagnostic test. Based on the Hounsfield unit characteristics of the lump, a radiologist can provide further insights. Follow your doctor's advice.
